**Subjective**
**Chief Complaint**
Diabetes follow-up

**History of Present Illness**
Patient reports feeling tired, experiencing two to three nighttime urination episodes, and increased thirst. These symptoms are consistent with his laboratory findings. His A1c is 9.2, which is significantly higher than his previous A1c of 7.4 six months ago. He reports checking his blood sugars at home, but has run out of test strips and has not been checking as regularly as recommended.
